animationPresets.name: Reveal Fade Up
animationPresets.description: Elements fade in and move upward on scroll

animationPresets.name: Stagger Cards
animationPresets.description: Card items animate sequentially with delay

animationPresets.name: Hover Lift
animationPresets.description: Cards and buttons lift and add shadow on hover

animationPresets.name: Logo Marquee
animationPresets.description: Infinite horizontal logo scroll for social proof sections

animationPresets.name: Counter Up
animationPresets.description: Stat values count up from zero on scroll reveal

animationPresets.name: Scale In Modal
animationPresets.description: Modals scale in from center with backdrop blur

animationPresets.name: Fade Up Spring
animationPresets.description: Springy entrance: fades in while rising with a slight overshoot

animationPresets.name: Stagger Children
animationPresets.description: Container staggers each direct child in sequence

animationPresets.name: Reveal Clip
animationPresets.description: Text/image revealed by expanding clip-path from bottom

animationPresets.name: Parallax Scroll
animationPresets.description: Background layer scrolls slower than foreground for depth

animationPresets.name: Hover Glow
animationPresets.description: Card emits a radial glow in the brand accent color on hover

animationPresets.name: Counter EaseOut
animationPresets.description: Numeric stats count up from zero with an easeOut deceleration

animationPresets.name: Marquee Loop
animationPresets.description: Infinite horizontal ticker – perfect for logo strips and tag clouds

animationPresets.name: Morph Blob
animationPresets.description: SVG background blob continuously morphs between organic shapes

animationPresets.name: Scale In Center
animationPresets.description: Modals and popovers scale in from center with ease-out

animationPresets.name: Slide In Right
animationPresets.description: Sidebars and drawers slide in from the right edge
